name: Ham and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. dried navy beans, or soup beans
recipeInstructions:
1) Soak the beans overnight. Drain them and cook in the ham broth until they are tender.
2) Add the remaining vegetables to the pot and continue cooking until they are soft.
3) Remove any bones from the soup. Stir in the parsley and pieces of leftover ham.
4) Simmer for a few minutes before serving.
